rows.title: Basic Auth
rows.firstBoundary: Closed credentials and the pinned rejection/error order only.

rows.title: Bearer Auth
rows.firstBoundary: No native bearer-token request guard.

rows.title: Body Limit
rows.firstBoundary: The unchanged upstream factory accepts one default-error closed maxSize from 0 through 64 KiB over Content-Length requests; custom onError, chunked request bodies, and limits above the transport cap are unsupported.

rows.title: Cache
rows.firstBoundary: No Cache API or external cache contract in alpha.

rows.title: Combine
rows.firstBoundary: General middleware combinator branching is not lowered.

rows.title: Compress
rows.firstBoundary: No native response compression or content negotiation.

rows.title: Context Storage
rows.firstBoundary: No async-local request context.

rows.title: CORS
rows.firstBoundary: Closed wildcard-origin options and static preflight values only; dynamic/non-wildcard origins and callback options are unsupported.

rows.title: CSRF Protection
rows.firstBoundary: Origin/content-type policy is not lowered.

rows.title: ETag
rows.firstBoundary: Closed response bodies and the pinned SHA-1/default options only.

rows.title: IP Restriction
rows.firstBoundary: No portable native connection-info policy.

rows.title: JSX Renderer
rows.firstBoundary: JSX responses compile, but renderer middleware/context variables do not.

rows.title: JWK Auth
rows.firstBoundary: No JWK fetch, crypto, or cache implementation.

rows.title: JWT Auth
rows.firstBoundary: No native JWT cryptography or payload variables.

rows.title: Language
rows.firstBoundary: No Accept-Language parser or cookie-backed selection.

rows.title: Logger
rows.firstBoundary: Only closed console.error lines are emitted; request logging is not implemented.

rows.title: Method Override
rows.firstBoundary: No form body or dispatch-method rewrite.

rows.title: Powered By
rows.firstBoundary: Pinned default header behavior only.

rows.title: Pretty JSON
rows.firstBoundary: Default query-name presence and closed JSON bodies only.

rows.title: Request ID
rows.firstBoundary: One matched policy per route supports the default generator, a closed non-empty token header name, and a closed 1-1024 byte limit; custom generators, empty/dynamic options, conflicting policies, and general Context variables are unsupported.

rows.title: Secure Headers
rows.firstBoundary: Static response headers exist, but the upstream middleware is not traced.

rows.title: Timeout
rows.firstBoundary: No cancellation or deadline propagation.

rows.title: Server Timing
rows.firstBoundary: Elapsed response-time headers exist, but Server-Timing metrics do not.

rows.title: Trailing Slash
rows.firstBoundary: No request redirect/rewrite specialization for this middleware.

rows.title: Accepts
rows.firstBoundary: No weighted Accept-family negotiation parser.

rows.title: Adapter
rows.firstBoundary: Platform adapter detection is contrary to the fixed native target contract.

rows.title: ConnInfo
rows.firstBoundary: Remote/local address data is not exposed.

rows.title: Cookie
rows.firstBoundary: One statically named getCookie and closed setCookie default/path generation are native; all-cookie objects, dynamic options, deletion, multiple cookies, prefixes, and signatures are unsupported.

rows.title: css
rows.firstBoundary: No CSS helper or Style component specialization.

rows.title: Dev
rows.firstBoundary: Runtime route inspection and development tooling are not in the server artifact.

rows.title: Factory
rows.firstBoundary: Pinned for the actor tracer; createMiddleware/createHandlers are not yet lowered as public contracts.

rows.title: html
rows.firstBoundary: Closed tagged templates and the pinned JSX SSR use; arbitrary raw values and callbacks are unsupported.

rows.title: JWT Authentication
rows.firstBoundary: No native JWT sign/verify/decode implementation.

rows.title: Proxy
rows.firstBoundary: Only a closed fetch-status expression exists; proxying streams/headers does not.

rows.title: Route
rows.firstBoundary: Route typing helpers are not an executable native feature.

rows.title: SSG
rows.firstBoundary: Static-site file emission is outside the alpha server pipeline.

rows.title: Streaming
rows.firstBoundary: Finite closed streamText writes only; no sleep, SSE, backpressure, or cancellation.

rows.title: Testing
rows.firstBoundary: app.request is used in Bun references, not emitted as a native in-process test client.

rows.title: WebSocket
rows.firstBoundary: No WebSocket upgrade or frame runtime.

rows.title: Best Practices
rows.firstBoundary: Guidance is reviewed, but it is not a discrete executable API.

rows.title: Helpers
rows.firstBoundary: Only html and finite streaming have native evidence.

rows.title: JSX
rows.firstBoundary: Server-side closed/request-time JSX subset only; client components and hooks are unsupported.

rows.title: Middleware
rows.firstBoundary: Closed onion ordering and selected effects only.

rows.title: RPC
rows.firstBoundary: No generated client or runtime RPC transport.

rows.title: Testing
rows.firstBoundary: Bun references exercise Hono; native in-process app.request is unavailable.

rows.title: Validation
rows.firstBoundary: Pinned Zod OpenAPI path minimum only; body/query/header/cookie validation is unsupported.

rows.title: Context
rows.firstBoundary: Selected text/json/html/redirect/notFound/header/status operations plus typed permitted string env bindings only.

rows.title: HTTPException
rows.firstBoundary: Closed Error routing exists, but HTTPException response semantics are not public evidence.

rows.title: App - Hono
rows.firstBoundary: Closed GET/POST/PUT/DELETE applications, bounded generated OPTIONS preflight, and selected lifecycle methods only.

rows.title: Presets
rows.firstBoundary: Published full and tiny entries are traced; other presets/adapters are not.

rows.title: HonoRequest
rows.firstBoundary: Selected param/query/header reads plus statically selected bounded JSON fields; arbitrary bodies and raw Request remain incomplete.

rows.title: Routing
rows.firstBoundary: Exact, named, terminal wildcard, nested, one numeric constraint, and finite trailing optional parameters; non-terminal catch-alls and general patterns are unsupported.

rows.title: Node.js
rows.firstBoundary: serve entry compatibility only; Node APIs and node-server lifecycle are not provided.

rows.title: Bun
rows.firstBoundary: Bun is a behavior reference and is not embedded in native artifacts.

rows.title: WebAssembly (w/ WASI)
rows.firstBoundary: The experimental runtime WASM profile is not an alpha Hono deployment target.

rows.title: Web Standards
rows.firstBoundary: Declarations are broad; executable native Web API evidence is explicitly allowlisted.
